description: Style noteA wallet is a subtle style essential, and every cosmopolitan man who knows the sartorial rights and wrongs needs a wallet like this one! This peter england wallet, with it stylish upper and practical, functional inner is an accessory must-have!Product DetailsSmooth black upper with embossed branding on the frontA flap on the inner with two card holders on top and two belowTwo main compartments and two slip pocketsTwo card holders on the left fold and one card holder and a zippered pocket on the right foldMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 9 cm Width: 11 cm
